meta_description: Advanced floor restoration systems including PU Floor Coating and Functional Additives for industrial and commercial environments. Terrazzo Polishing coming soon.
hero_description: Advanced restoration systems for modern environments. High-performance PU coatings. Terrazzo polishing coming soon.
services_description: Comprehensive floor care engineered for longevity and performance.
pu_description: Complete surface renewal without removal. High-performance sealer system.
terrazzo_description: Sustainable diamond polishing to restore natural stone brilliance.
additives_description: Enhance your floor's capabilities with specialized protective additives.
technology_description: Our PU Sealer outperforms traditional solutions like Epoxy and Wax in critical industrial applications.
tech_flexibility_pu: PU: High elasticity, resists cracking under stress.
tech_uv_pu: PU: 100% Aliphatic. Does not yellow over time.
tech_uv_epoxy: Epoxy: Yellows significantly with UV exposure.
tech_curing_pu: PU: Walkable in hours, fully cured overnight.
tech_curing_epoxy: Epoxy: Requires 3-7 days for full cure.
water_savings_desc: Our sustainable restoration process dramatically reduces water consumption compared to traditional floor replacement and maintenance methods.
sectors_description: Tailored solutions for specific industry requirements.
sector_industrial_desc: Emphasis on extreme durability and zero downtime. Heavy load bearing capacity.
sector_healthcare_desc: Meeting strict hygiene requirements. Hermetically sealed and easy to sanitize.
sector_commercial_desc: Balancing high aesthetics with public safety (R10/R11 anti-slip ratings).
